# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

imports:
- path: vm-instance.jinja
- path: cloudsql-instance.jinja
- path: storage-bucket.jinja
- path: load-balancer.jinja

resources:
- name: app-network
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: false
    routingConfig:
      routingMode: REGIONAL

- name: app-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    region: {{ properties["region"] }}
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.10.0.0/24

- name: app-firewall-allow-http-https
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: TCP
      ports:
      - "80"
      - "443"
    targetTags:
    - web

- name: app-firewall-allow-health-check
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
    - 130.211.0.0/22
    - 35.191.0.0/16
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: TCP
      ports:
      - "80"
    targetTags:
    - web

- name: app-firewall-allow-internal
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
    - 10.10.0.0/24
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: TCP
    - IPProtocol: UDP
    - IPProtocol: ICMP

- name: app-storage
  type: storage-bucket.jinja
  properties:
    bucketName: {{ properties["bucketName"] }}
    location: {{ properties["bucketLocation"] }}

- name: app-sql
  type: cloudsql-instance.jinja
  properties:
    region: {{ properties["region"] }}
    zone: {{ properties["zone"] }}
    instanceName: {{ properties["sql"]["instanceName"] }}
    databaseVersion: {{ properties["sql"]["databaseVersion"] }}
    tier: {{ properties["sql"]["tier"] }}
    rootPassword: {{ properties["sql"]["rootPassword"] }}
    databaseName: {{ properties["sql"]["databaseName"] }}
    userName: {{ properties["sql"]["userName"] }}
    userPassword: {{ properties["sql"]["userPassword"] }}

- name: app-instance-template
  type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
  properties:
    properties:
      machineType: {{ properties["compute"]["machineType"] }}
      tags:
        items:
        - web
      disks:
      - deviceName: boot
        type: PERSISTENT
        boot: true
        autoDelete: true
        initializeParams:
          sourceImage: projects/{{ properties["compute"]["imageProject"] }}/global/images/family/{{ properties["compute"]["imageFamily"] }}
          diskSizeGb: {{ properties["compute"]["diskSizeGb"] }}
      networkInterfaces:
      - subnetwork: $(ref.app-subnet.selfLink)
        accessConfigs:
        - name: External NAT
          type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
      metadata:
        items:
        - key: startup-script
          value: |
            #!/bin/bash
            apt-get update
            apt-get install -y nginx
            systemctl enable nginx
            systemctl restart nginx
      serviceAccounts:
      - email: default
        scopes:
        - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform

- name: app-instance-group
  type: compute.v1.regionInstanceGroupManager
  properties:
    region: {{ properties["region"] }}
    baseInstanceName: app
    instanceTemplate: $(ref.app-instance-template.selfLink)
    targetSize: {{ properties["compute"]["instanceCount"] }}
    namedPorts:
    - name: http
      port: 80

- name: app-autoscaler
  type: compute.v1.regionAutoscaler
  properties:
    region: {{ properties["region"] }}
    target: $(ref.app-instance-group.selfLink)
    autoscalingPolicy:
      minNumReplicas: {{ properties["compute"]["minReplicas"] }}
      maxNumReplicas: {{ properties["compute"]["maxReplicas"] }}
      cpuUtilization:
        utilizationTarget: 0.6

- name: app-load-balancer
  type: load-balancer.jinja
  properties:
    region: {{ properties["region"] }}
    backendServiceName: app-backend-service
    healthCheckName: app-health-check
    urlMapName: app-url-map
    proxyName: app-http-proxy
    forwardingRuleName: app-http-forwarding-rule
    instanceGroup: $(ref.app-instance-group.instanceGroup)
    port: 80

outputs:
- name: network
  value: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
- name: subnetwork
  value: $(ref.app-subnet.selfLink)
- name: bucket
  value: $(ref.app-storage.bucketName)
- name: sqlConnectionName
  value: $(ref.app-sql.connectionName)
- name: loadBalancerIP
  value: $(ref.app-load-balancer.ipAddress)

---
resources:
- name: {{ properties["instanceName"] }}
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    region: {{ properties["region"] }}
    databaseVersion: {{ properties["databaseVersion"] }}
    settings:
      tier: {{ properties["tier"] }}
      availabilityType: ZONAL
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true

- name: {{ properties["instanceName"] }}-db
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
  properties:
    name: {{ properties["databaseName"] }}
    instance: $(ref.{{ properties["instanceName"] }}.name)

- name: {{ properties["instanceName"] }}-user
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.user
  properties:
    name: {{ properties["userName"] }}
    instance: $(ref.{{ properties["instanceName"] }}.name)
    password: {{ properties["userPassword"] }}

outputs:
- name: connectionName
  value: $(ref.{{ properties["instanceName"] }}.connectionName)

---
resources:
- name: {{ properties["bucketName"] }}
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: {{ properties["bucketName"] }}
    location: {{ properties["location"] }}
    storageClass: STANDARD
    versioning:
      enabled: false

outputs:
- name: bucketName
  value: $(ref.{{ properties["bucketName"] }}.name)

---
resources:
- name: {{ properties["healthCheckName"] }}
  type: compute.v1.healthCheck
  properties:
    type: HTTP
    httpHealthCheck:
      port: {{ properties["port"] }}
      requestPath: /

- name: {{ properties["backendServiceName"] }}
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL
    protocol: HTTP
    portName: http
    timeoutSec: 30
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.{{ properties["healthCheckName"] }}.selfLink)
    backends:
    - group: {{ properties["instanceGroup"] }}

- name: {{ properties["urlMapName"] }}
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultService: $(ref.{{ properties["backendServiceName"] }}.selfLink)

- name: {{ properties["proxyName"] }}
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.{{ properties["urlMapName"] }}.selfLink)

- name: {{ properties["forwardingRuleName"] }}
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL
    portRange: "80"
    target: $(ref.{{ properties["proxyName"] }}.selfLink)
    IPProtocol: TCP

outputs:
- name: ipAddress
  value: $(ref.{{ properties["forwardingRuleName"] }}.IPAddress)

---
imports:
- path: main.jinja
- path: cloudsql-instance.jinja
- path: storage-bucket.jinja
- path: load-balancer.jinja

resources:
- name: complete-app-stack
  type: main.jinja
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    zone: us-central1-a
    bucketName: my-mvp-app-bucket
    bucketLocation: US
    sql:
      instanceName: my-mvp-sql
      databaseVersion: MYSQL_8_0
      tier: db-f1-micro
      rootPassword: change-me-root
      databaseName: appdb
      userName: appuser
      userPassword: change-me-user
    compute:
      machineType: e2-medium
      imageProject: debian-cloud
      imageFamily: debian-12
      diskSizeGb: 20
      instanceCount: 2
      minReplicas: 2
      maxReplicas: 4
